'''Vexen''' was a city on the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony [[Kallistas]], during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was the center of the extraction of [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] elements, with more than one hundred workers working on it, although the harshness of the place made most of them leave. Although nominally under Imperial control, the people were unhappy with [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]] and admired local [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Jondrell Inx]].
